title: Croatian Bakalar with Charred Melon Salad
description: A Chinese-inspired dish featuring charred melon and Croatian dried fish bakalar, perfect for a light summer meal.
instructions: In a small saucepan, combine soy sauce, honey, and rice vinegar. Bring to a boil over medium heat and cook for 5 minutes.
In a separate pan, toast sesame seeds over low heat for 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
In a large bowl, combine charred melon, grated ginger, and chopped green onions.
Add the cooked soy sauce mixture to the bowl and toss to combine.
Stir in the toasted sesame seeds and flaked bakalar.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
